title: ASPECTEK Wasp Traps, 2-Pack – Reusable Hourglass-Shaped Traps, Yellow Jacket & Hornet Catchers for Indoor & Outdoor Use
bullet_points: EFFECTIVE WASP TRAP: This wasp trap safely and quickly eliminates wasps, especially near fruit, vegetables, and food scraps. It’s also effective against fruit flies, gnats, and functions well as wasp nest killer alternative.

EASY TO FILL & USE: Just add your favorite natural, non-toxic lure or follow the included apple cider vinegar recipe - easy to make in minutes. No need to purchase additional lures. Ideal for anyone looking for wasp catchers for the garden or kitchen.
SPILL-PROOF DESIGN: The trap is hard to spill and easy to clean and refill, making it one of the most practical wasp traps outdoor or indoor options available.

SAFE FOR FAMILY & PETS: Non-toxic and safe to use around children, pets, and food. Perfect for both indoor and outdoor use, including patios, kitchens, gardens, and more. A secure wasp traps outdoor hanging option.

DECORATIVE & FUNCTIONAL: This hourglass-shaped wasp trap blends beautifully into any home or garden décor while protecting your space. The trumpet-shaped holes allow wasps and insects in, but prevent escape. The transparent chamber lets you monitor the trap easily.

Bee-Friendly Design – Supports Pollinators: Designed with selective entry points to help target wasps while reducing the likelihood of trapping bees. Bees are important pollinators, so this trap supports more responsible outdoor wasp control in gardens and patios.
